title: I spent a weekend traveling with the Galaxy S26 Ultra’s Privacy Display – what you should know
summary: The Galaxy S26 series as a whole isn’t anything all that groundbreaking, but if there’s one feature that should have your attention, it’s the Privacy Display on the Galaxy S26 Ultra. This feature is rightfully the standout addition to this year’s lineup and, after spending a busy couple of days in …

title: The Baseus PicoGo AM52 is the ultra-slim, travel-friendly Qi2.2 power bank you need
summary: Pocket-sized doesn't mean compromising on features.
body: Credit: Baseus A low battery notification can turn a perfectly fine day into a mild emergency. Battery anxiety is a real thing, and it’s only gotten worse as our phones do more. That’s where Baseus, a leading charging accessory brand, comes in. With the new PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 power bank, Baseus specifically takes that stress off the table. Not only does it add more battery, but Baseus rethinks what a power bank should actually feel like to carry and use every day, so you aren’t lugging around something big, bulky, and not travel-friendly. Here’s what you need to know.

title: Eater Named 2026 ASME Finalist
summary: The National Magazine Awards has named Eater as a finalist in the category of General Excellence, Service and Lifestyle.
